SELECT atoi(value) FROM test_atoi WHERE value LIKE '%abc%';
SELECT atoi(value) FROM test_atoi WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.value, b.value, atoi(a.value) + atoi(b.value) AS total FROM test_atoi a JOIN test_atoi b ON a.value <> b.value;
SELECT atoi(value) AS parsed_value FROM (SELECT value FROM test_atoi WHERE value NOT LIKE '%[^0-9-]%') AS sub;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_atoi WHERE atoi(value) = 0;
SELECT DISTINCT atoi(value) FROM test_atoi WHERE atoi(value) >= 0 AND atoi(value) < 100;
SELECT atoi(value) FROM test_atoi WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM test_atoi WHERE value LIKE '%1%') ORDER BY atoi(value);
SELECT CASE WHEN atoi(value) < 0 THEN 'Negative' ELSE 'Non-Negative' END AS sign FROM test_atoi;
